social_signals: Liberty Chowk pe pani bhar gaya, gaariyan phans gayi hain. Koi solution nahi?
Canal Road bilkul band ho gaya hai, knee-deep pani hai. WASA kahan hai?
Major flooding at Liberty underpass. At least 12 vehicles stranded. RESCUE 1122 needed urgently.
MM Alam Road pe bhi paani aa gaya. Gulberg me traffic completely jam hai. Bachao!
Liberty underpass mein gaari doob gayi. Please Canal Road avoid karo.
Worst flooding I have seen at Liberty Chowk. Roads are rivers. Use Jail Road alternate route!
Gulberg main drain overflow ho gaya. Dukanen bhi doob rahi hain. Khuda ka waasta WASA ko bhejo.
WASA drainage completely overwhelmed at Liberty. Second hour of flooding with no response seen.
Water level at Liberty Chowk is dangerously high. Emergency services please respond.
Traffic at standstill on Canal Road. Speed down to almost zero. Massive flooding incident.
Ambulance bhi phans gayi Canal Road pe. Serious emergency hai. 1122 ko call karo!
Liberty underpass is completely submerged, canal is overflowing. Send help now!
Baarish ne Liberty Chowk ko talab bana diya. Gaariyan pani mein doob rahi hain.
